scripts.dev:portless:web: WORKTREE_NAME=$(basename $PWD) SUPABASE_API_PORT=$(for p in $(seq 54321 54398); do lsof -nP -iTCP:$p -sTCP:LISTEN >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo $p; break; }; done) SUPABASE_DB_PORT=$(for p in $(seq 54400 54498); do lsof -nP -iTCP:$p -sTCP:LISTEN >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo $p; break; }; done) turbo run dev:portless --filter @apps/web
